products.name: A-Life Beyond Critical Care
products.keyFeatures: Maturity benefit (up to 150% of premiums), AIA Vitality yearly cash bonuses

products.name: A-Life Essential Critical Care
products.keyFeatures: Convertible to death/TPD plan, AIA Vitality benefits, health screening benefit

products.name: PRUAll Care
products.keyFeatures: Mental health coverage, post-surgery recovery benefit, intensive care support

products.name: PRUMan / PRULady
products.keyFeatures: Up to 260% coverage for gender-specific illnesses, fertility care, wellness care, cash rewards for life milestones, 110% total premium return at maturity

products.name: GREAT Critical Care Relief
products.keyFeatures: Covers 7-day ICU stay and 21-day hospitalization for major surgery, returns total premiums paid or more at maturity

products.name: GREAT Early VantageCare 2
products.keyFeatures: Participating plan with non-guaranteed bonuses, multiple claims allowed, death/TPD benefit

products.name: GREAT VantageCare 2
products.keyFeatures: Participating plan with non-guaranteed bonuses, additional sum assured, optional riders

products.name: GREAT Generation Care
products.keyFeatures: Automatically covers children up to age 18 for 50 CI + 11 child illnesses; optional Parent Protect Rider

products.name: GREAT Multi Cancer Care
products.keyFeatures: Recovery benefit (additional 50% of SA upon advanced stage), up to 150% of total premiums paid at maturity, cancer-based underwriting

products.name: A-Life Cancer360
products.keyFeatures: Early stage: 30% payout + 20% recovery reward; Advanced stage: 100% + 50% for 5 years; Power Reset; maturity payment of 100% SA

products.name: HLA Vital Secure
products.keyFeatures: First claim terminates policy; covers Cancer, Heart Attack, Stroke, Coronary Artery Bypass, Kidney Failure, plus Accidental TPD up to age 75 (RM500k) and Fracture benefit

products.name: A-Life MediFlex
products.keyFeatures: Zero co-insurance, covers outpatient cancer & kidney dialysis, worldwide coverage (up to 90 consecutive days)

products.name: GREAT Medic Shield 2
products.keyFeatures: Optional GREAT Medic Million Extender 2 rider to extend annual limit up to RM1.5 million

products.name: GREAT Medic Lite Secure
products.coverageTerm: Coverage until expiry age of existing medical plan/rider
products.annualLimit: Varies by plan (e.g., H75B: RM125k, H79B: RM500k)
products.lifetimeLimit: Varies by plan (e.g., H75B: RM125k, H79B: RM500k)
products.deductible: Deductible from RM2,500 per policy year
products.keyFeatures: Easy switch from eligible medical plans with no medical underwriting, RM50 daily cash allowance for government hospital stays, no waiting period for switchers

products.name: Allianz DiabeticEssential
products.keyFeatures: Designed for diabetics, annual health screening benefits, premium discounts up to 40% for improving/maintaining health, covers traditional medicine (up to RM1,500/year)

products.name: HLA MedGLOBAL IV Plus
products.coverageTerm: Guaranteed renewable up to 85 years old
products.keyFeatures: No co-insurance, can be attached to traditional life or ILP policies

products.name: HLA Major Medi II
products.keyFeatures: Guaranteed renewal but premium not guaranteed; covers pre & post hospitalization, outpatient cancer & kidney dialysis, surgical fees

products.name: A-Life MediFlex-i
products.deductible: Deductible RM500–RM20k OR 20% co-takaful up to RM3,000
products.keyFeatures: Takaful compliant; optional A-Plus MediBoost-i (increase annual limit) and A-Plus MediRecover-i (recovery benefit) riders; AIA Vitality Health Rewards
